name: opspilot-ai-monorepo
description: Autonomous AI DevOps & Cloud Operations Platform

scripts.backend:dev: cd apps/backend && poetry run uvicorn src.main:create_app --reload
scripts.backend:lint: cd apps/backend && poetry run ruff check . && poetry run black --check .
scripts.ai:dev: cd apps/ai-orchestrator && poetry run uvicorn src.main:create_app --reload --port 8001
scripts.ai:lint: cd apps/ai-orchestrator && poetry run ruff check . && poetry run black --check .
scripts.lint:all: pnpm frontend:lint && pnpm backend:lint && pnpm ai:lint
